description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the ros:noetic-ros-core Docker image, runs a before_script that updates apt, installs git, clones https://gitlab.com/VictorLamoine/ros_gitlab_ci.git, and sources ros_gitlab_ci/gitlab-ci.bash, and defines a variable ROS_PACKAGES_TO_INSTALL set to actionlib. Define a single stage named build. Add a melodic catkin build job that uses the ros:melodic-ros-core image and executes catkin build --summarize --no-status --force-color in the build stage. Add a melodic catkin_make job using ros:melodic-ros-core that runs catkin_make, a noetic catkin build job using the default ros:noetic-ros-core image that runs catkin build --summarize --no-status --force-color, and a noetic catkin_make job using the default image that runs catkin_make, all in the build stage.
